---
title: "Courses"
description: |
  This page lists all workshops, talks, and sessions with details and thumbnails.
listing:
  - id: bioinformatics
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, start_date]
    contents: 
      - courses_1   # AlphaFold
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: scientific
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image, start_date]
    contents: 
      - courses_2   # Scientific Design & PowerPoint
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
---

## Basic Bioinformatics Course 

::: {#bioinformatics}
:::

## Computer Aided Drug Design

::: {#scientific}
:::
